user_prompt: a man preparing to leave his apartment on a rainy morning

style_bible.visual_style: Naturalistic with muted colors, emphasizing wet surfaces and reflections; soft focus backgrounds with sharp subject detail
style_bible.camera_rules: Use mostly smooth slow dolly and pan movements; avoid abrupt cuts; maintain consistent eye-level framing
style_bible.lighting_rules: Diffused natural light simulating overcast rainy morning; soft shadows; cool color temperature
style_bible.continuity_rules: Consistent wardrobe (gray raincoat, dark jeans), hairstyle (short brown hair), and props (black umbrella, keys); maintain apartment interior with wet window and wet porch outside

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Establish a man inside his apartment preparing to leave on a rainy morning

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: man with short brown hair, gray raincoat, dark jeans
- location: small apartment living room with wet window showing rain outside, wooden floor, potted plant

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium shot, subject center
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow dolly forward
- subject & action: man stands by window looking out at rain, by 2s he picks up black umbrella from stand, by 3s he turns toward door
- environment details: raindrops on window, umbrella stand, small table with keys
- lighting: soft diffused light from window, cool temperature
- cinematic look: natural film stock, low contrast, shallow depth of field

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: medium close-up, subject right side
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow pan left
- subject & action: man reaches for keys on table at 4s, picks them up at 5s, puts on raincoat hood by 7s
- environment details: wet floor reflections, keys on table, coat rack
- lighting: soft overhead light, cool tone
- cinematic look: naturalistic with slight film grain

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: wide shot, subject left side near door
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow dolly backward
- subject & action: man opens door at 8s, steps out onto wet porch at 9s, pauses holding umbrella open at 10s
- environment details: wet porch tiles, raindrops falling, outdoor plants
- lighting: ambient soft light from outside
- cinematic look: muted color palette, natural contrast

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow dolly forward, slow pan left, slow dolly backward
scenes.audio_cue: soft rain sounds with distant thunder

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: Show the man struggling with his umbrella as the rain intensifies outside the apartment

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: man with short brown hair, gray raincoat, dark jeans, holding black umbrella
- location: apartment doorway and wet porch with rain falling

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: medium shot, subject center near door
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow pan right
- subject & action: man tries to open umbrella, by 2s umbrella flips inside out, by 3s he frowns and adjusts grip
- environment details: rain falling heavily, wet porch floor, umbrella fabric
- lighting: overcast natural light, soft shadows
- cinematic look: natural film grain, moderate contrast

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: close-up on hands and umbrella
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: hands struggle to fix umbrella frame, by 5s umbrella partially opens correctly, by 7s rain droplets fall from umbrella edges
- environment details: water droplets, umbrella ribs, wet hands
- lighting: diffused cool light
- cinematic look: sharp detail on hands, shallow depth of field

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium shot, subject left side
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: slow dolly forward
- subject & action: man finally opens umbrella fully at 8s, steps forward onto porch at 9s, looks up at sky at 10s
- environment details: heavy rain, wet plants, porch tiles
- lighting: soft natural light
- cinematic look: muted colors, natural contrast

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow pan right, static close-up, slow dolly forward
scenes.audio_cue: louder rain with wind gusts and umbrella fabric rustling

scenes.prompt:
SCENE INTENT: The man confidently steps out into the rain with his umbrella fully open

GLOBAL CONTINUITY:
- main subject: man with short brown hair, gray raincoat, dark jeans, holding black umbrella
- location: wet porch and rainy street outside apartment

SHOT 1 (0–3s):
- framing: wide shot, subject center stepping off porch
- lens: 35mm
- camera movement: slow dolly left
- subject & action: man steps down from porch at 1s, adjusts umbrella at 2s, begins walking forward at 3s
- environment details: wet pavement, rain falling, street lamp
- lighting: overcast natural light, cool tone
- cinematic look: natural colors, soft focus background

SHOT 2 (3–7s):
- framing: medium shot, subject right side walking
- lens: 50mm
- camera movement: steady handheld subtle
- subject & action: man walks steadily, umbrella held above head, raindrops splash on ground, at 7s he looks ahead
- environment details: puddles, wet leaves, distant cars
- lighting: diffused daylight
- cinematic look: slight film grain, moderate contrast

SHOT 3 (7–10s):
- framing: medium close-up, subject center
- lens: 85mm
- camera movement: static
- subject & action: man pauses walking at 8s, smiles slightly at 9s, umbrella tilted to shield face at 10s
- environment details: rain droplets on umbrella, blurred background
- lighting: soft natural light
- cinematic look: warm film tone, shallow depth of field

AVOID: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.negative_prompt: text, logos, subtitles, watermarks, extra limbs, distorted faces, flicker, glitch
scenes.camera: slow dolly left, steady handheld subtle, static
scenes.audio_cue: steady rain with soft footsteps on wet pavement
